visualizerParams.title: Capitalization Empty String Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The capitalization function is crashing when an empty string is provided as input. Find and fix the missing safety check.

solution.explanation: Accessing `s[0]` on an empty string raises an `IndexError`. We must add a check to see if the string is empty and return it as-is (or an empty string) before attempting to access its first character.
